name: BB:UBA : Privileged Activity
notes: Indicates when a user has performed an action which is considered to be privileged.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified
BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed
BB:CategoryDefinition: System or Device Configuration Change
BB:UBA : Privileged Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, BB:CategoryDefinition: Auditing Changed, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Escalations, BB:CategoryDefinition: Service Started, BB:CategoryDefinition: System Configuration, BB:CategoryDefinition: System or Device Configuration Change, BB:CategoryDefinition: Windows Compliance Events, BB:Database: User Addition or Change, BB:Review Of Access Rights, BB:System Update Policy Violation Events, BB:VMware: Session Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Created Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Removal Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Updated Activity, BB:Audit Tools Access
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Privileged Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Application or Service Installed or Modified, BB:CategoryDefinition: Auditing Changed, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Escalations, BB:CategoryDefinition: Service Started, BB:CategoryDefinition: System Configuration, BB:CategoryDefinition: System or Device Configuration Change, BB:CategoryDefinition: Windows Compliance Events, BB:Database: User Addition or Change, BB:Review Of Access Rights, BB:System Update Policy Violation Events, BB:VMware: Session Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Created Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Removal Activity, BB:VMware: User Account, Role and Permission Updated Activity, BB:Audit Tools Access
